case_title: IN RE: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU AS TO RESPONDENT DANG, KHOAN

MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTEROGGS & REQ FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCS & AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU HEARING SET FOR FEB-24-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $578.80, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
